issues.description: Card effect text states '[Main]' which is an Activated ability, not OnPlay trigger. Should use trigger:'Activated' not 'OnPlay'

Second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and PlayFromHand action is not supported by card text. Card only describes the Main ability to Rest opponent's Characters. This effect appears to be completely fabricated and should be removed
Target should specify 'maxCount':1 to match 'up to 1' in card text. Current target lacks count restriction
